hero.h1: The #1 AI-Powered Cloud Contact Center for Global Teams
hero.subtitle: The premier Reliable VoIP Provider, offering intelligent Global Voice Termination. VestaCall helps modern businesses connect, support, and grow seamlessly.
hero.definition: VestaCall is an AI-powered cloud contact center platform that unifies voice, messaging, video, and AI communication tools into one seamless solution for modern businesses.

containers.title: AI-Powered Intelligence
containers.description: Real-time analytics, instant sentiment processing, and deep performance tracking to empower your agents with predictive context.
containers.painPoint: Stop guessing what customers need—AI knows before they ask.

containers.title: Global Voice Network
containers.description: 99.999% uptime with auto-failover across global data centers. High ASR, low PDD, crystal-clear HD voice quality worldwide.
containers.painPoint: Your calls connect instantly, anywhere in the world.

containers.title: Enterprise Security
containers.description: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR & HIPAA compliant. End-to-end encryption on every call, every time.
containers.painPoint: Bank-grade security without the bank-grade complexity.

items.description: Never miss a call. AI handles FAQs, qualifies leads, and transfers to humans when needed.

comparison.title: VestaCall vs. Competitors

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about VestaCall.

items.question: What is UCaaS and how does VestaCall help?
items.answer: UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) is a cloud-based phone system that integrates voice, messaging, video, and AI communication tools into one platform. VestaCall provides enterprise-grade UCaaS with 99.999% uptime, global coverage, and AI-powered features at a fraction of traditional costs.

items.question: How long does it take to set up VestaCall?
items.answer: You can create an account and port your existing numbers entirely online in under 5 minutes. Our onboarding is completely self-serve with zero-code CRM integrations for Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zendesk.

items.question: Does VestaCall support international calling?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer local, mobile, and toll-free numbers in over 100 countries. Our global voice termination network ensures crystal-clear calls with high ASR and low PDD metrics worldwide.

items.question: What is the difference between VestaCall and RingCentral?
items.answer: Unlike RingCentral, VestaCall includes AI-powered features (sentiment analysis, AI receptionist) at no extra cost, offers 1-second billing precision vs. 60-second rounding, provides unlimited SIP trunking channels, and guarantees 99.999% uptime with financial penalties.

items.question: Is VestaCall HIPAA and GDPR compliant?
items.answer: Yes. VestaCall is SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant for healthcare, GDPR compliant for European data protection, and PCI DSS compliant for payment processing. Your data is encrypted end-to-end.

cta.title: Stop Losing Revenue to Missed Calls and Poor Customer Experience
cta.description: Experience the difference AI-powered cloud communication makes. Free setup, free number porting, 14-day free trial.
cta.guarantee: No credit card required. Full access. Start in 5 minutes.
